title: malaxis iwashinae
intro: Malaxis iwashinae is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Malaxis iwashinae include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Malaxis iwashinae are often made into teas or infusions, and are traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
